creator: cryptogranny@gmail.com
text: What is the best way to build FreeBSD kernel on one machine and then to install it on another with all suplementary debug (/usr/lib/debug/boot/kernel)? As far as I understand this can not be done via packages? I have to copy manually the custom files over default GENERIC and then reboot? How does two module directories (/boot/kernel) coexist on the same system?
